zh.lifeSummary: 當James Sisson I於1656年4月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，他的父親Richard Sisson48歲，母親Mary42歲。他於1675年與Elizabeth Anthony在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯結婚。他去世於1734年6月15日在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Sisson I于1656年4月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，他的父亲Richard Sisson48岁，母亲Mary42岁。他于1675年与Elizabeth Anthony在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯结婚。他去世于1734年6月15日在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Sis(se), Cisse, a pet form of Cecily (see Sisley ) + -son.
variant of Syson, a habitational name from Syston (Leicestershire), from a short form of an Old English personal name such as Sigehǣth or Sigefrith + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Sissons
meanings: variant of Sisson , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When James Sisson I was born on 8 April 1656, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Richard Sisson, was 48 and his mother, Mary, was 42. He married Elizabeth Anthony in 1675, in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. He died on 15 June 1734, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Sisson I est né le 8 avril 1656, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Sisson, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Anthony en 1675, à Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1734, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Sisson I am 8. April 1656 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Sisson 48 und seine Mutter Mary 42. Er hat 1675 in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America Elizabeth Anthony geheiratet. Er starb am 15. Juni 1734 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Sisson I è nato il il 8 aprile 1656 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Richard Sisson, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Anthony nel 1675, nel Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Morì il 15 giugno 1734, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Sisson Iが1656年4月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父Richard Sissonは48歳，母Maryは42歳であった。1675年にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウスでElizabeth Anthonyと結婚した。彼は1734年6月15日に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Sisson I(이)가 1656년 4월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Sisson(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1675년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스에서 Elizabeth Anthony(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1734년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Sisson I nasceu em 8 de abril de 1656, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Sisson, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Anthony em 1675, em Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1734, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Sisson I родился 8 апреля 1656 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard Sisson было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Anthony в 1675 г. в местности порцмоут, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 15 июня 1734 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.
